arts.sum: Hull City will not be pursuing a deal for Nottingham Forest midfielder Lewis O’Brien this winter, a report… The post Update emerges on potential Hull City move for forgotten Nottingham Forest man appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Official in England to ‘advance negotiations’ for Sheffield United player – Blades ‘high price’ and competition posing challenge
arts.sum: Palmeiras are actively working on strengthening their squad and have included Sheffield United’s Vinicius Souza in their target list. That’s according to ESPN in Brazil, who state Palmeiras want to sign the 25-year-old in the winter market. Sheffield United took the midfielder from Lommel SK in August 2023 and offered him a deal until 2027. The post Official in England to ‘advance negotiations’ for Sheffield United player – Blades ‘high price’ and competition posing challenge appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Hull City transfer stance on Nottingham Forest outcast confirmed
arts.sum: He has again been linked with a move to City's Championship rivals Blackburn Rovers after a previous move to Ewood Park collapsed, but again, O'Brien's salary makes it a difficult deal to do in this window. Hull City will not be signing Nottingham Forest midfielder Lewis O'Brien, despite transfer links to the out of favour former Huddersfield Town ace.

arts.ttl: Ruben Selles reveals Hull City transfer plan for midfielder Marvin Mehlem
arts.sum: "I wish him all the best, and hopefully, he can go there, play games, and feel himself again as the football player that he is, and then we will address the situation in the summer." Hull City head coach Ruben Selles says it's too soon to write off Marvin Mehlem as a Tigers player after the midfielder left the club on loan earlier this month.
